About Me

Designer
Since 2023
Introduction

Sukhmanjot Singh

I'm a passionate multidisciplinary creative designer based in Punjab, India. My world revolves around crafting visually compelling stories — from sleek brand identities to cinematic video edits and immersive motion graphics.

With a deep command of Adobe's creative ecosystem and a cinematic aesthetic sensibility, I approach every project with the same intensity a film director brings to a frame — every element intentional, every detail purposeful.

Whether it's a brand logo, a motion reel, or a full VFX sequence, my goal is the same: to make people feel something.

Graphics Design Motion Graphics 2D Animation Video Editing VFX Adobe Suite

Credentials

My Qualifications

Academic Qualification
Level 12th Standard (Senior Secondary)
Percentage 60%

Experience

Creative Journey

2026
Freelance Logo Designer

Designed a complete brand identity including primary logo, variations, color palette, and brand guidelines for ABCD Brand — a commercial client project executed independently.

2024 – 2025
Creative Practice & Skill Building

Intensive self-directed learning and project execution across graphics design, motion graphics, 2D animation, VFX compositing, and video editing using the full Adobe suite.

2023
Started Creative Journey

Began exploring digital design and visual storytelling — fell in love with Adobe tools and the art of motion design. The spark that ignited a creative career.

Honours

Awards & Recognition

2025
Emerging Graphics Designer Award

Awarded for exceptional talent, rapid skill development, and outstanding visual work that stood apart from peers in the field of graphic design.

2024
Best Student Award

Recognized for exemplary academic dedication, creative excellence, and inspirational work ethic that set a benchmark for fellow students.
